Container.Name: ScrapeGPT
Container.Overview: ScrapeGPT is a web app that scrapes websites and answers questions about them using a local LLM via Ollama. Provides a Gradio web UI accessible on the configured port. The image is published to GitHub Container Registry and will be pulled automatically when you start the container.
Container.Requires: Ollama container (e.g., ollama/ollama) must be running and accessible at the configured OLLAMA_HOST URL.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Gradio web interface.

Config.Name: Ollama Host
Config.Description: URL of the Ollama API. Use the container name if Ollama runs on the same Docker network (e.g. http://ollama:11434), or the host IP for host-network setups (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:11434).

Config.Name: Ollama Model
Config.Description: The Ollama model to use for answering questions. The model must already be pulled inside your Ollama container (run: docker exec -it ollama ollama pull qwen:0.5b).

Config.Name: Ollama Vision Model
Config.Description: (Optional) The Ollama model to use for image analysis. Must support multimodal input (e.g. llava). Pull it first: docker exec -it ollama ollama pull llava. Leave blank to disable image analysis.

Config.Name: Gradio Port (env)
Config.Description: Internal Gradio server port. Change only if you need a non-default port inside the container.

Config.Name: Telegram Bot Token
Config.Description: (Optional) Telegram Bot API token. Only required when running the Telegram bot (scrapeGPT.py) instead of the Gradio app.

Config.Name: WhisperLive Host
Config.Description: (Optional) URL of a running WhisperLive service for GPU-accelerated speech transcription, e.g. http://whisperlive:9090. Use ghcr.io/collabora/whisperlive-gpu:latest as the WhisperLive container image. Leave empty to disable speech transcription (music analysis still works without it).

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for scraped content database (db.json).

Config.Name: Qdrant Vector Store
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the local Qdrant vector database used for embeddings.
